hypothesis: A momentum strategy using EMA crossover with Bollinger confirmation and volume oscillator filter capitalizes on temporary trend continuation following low-volatility basing periods, where volume oscillators confirm institutional accumulation and Bollinger bands validate price position relative to volatility regime

A breakout from a low volatility period confirmed by positive volume oscillator signals a temporary continuation trend that can be captured with EMA crossovers and Bollinger band confirmation, using ATR for dynamic risk management.
